step_1_notes.description: Protected zone length measured from column face

step_1_notes.requirement: The end plate shall be connected to the flange of the column.

step_1_notes.description: Distancias verticales h1, h2, h3 y h4 para trazabilidad geometrica
step_1_notes.requirement: h1, h2, h3 y h4 medidos desde la mitad del espesor del ala inferior de la viga

step_1_notes.description: Diametro estandar de perforacion (dh) para pernos en end plate
step_1_notes.requirement: dh segun tabla de agujero estandar: d+1/16 (hasta 7/8 in); d+1/8 (>=1 in)
step_1_notes.formula: dh = d + 1/16 in (db<=7/8 in) else dh = d + 1/8 in

step_1_notes.description: Derived end-plate stiffener geometry and detailing edge requirement
step_1_notes.requirement: hst = pfo + de; Lst = hst/tan(30 deg); edge detailing >= 25 mm
step_1_notes.formula: hst = pfo + de; Lst = hst / tan(30 deg)

step_1_notes.description: Requisitos de soldadura entre ala de viga y placa de extremo
step_1_notes.requirement: La unión entre el ala de la viga y la placa de extremo debe ejecutarse con una soldadura de ranura CJP sin respaldo. La soldadura de ranura CJP debe realizarse de modo que la raíz de la soldadura quede del lado del alma de la viga respecto del ala. La cara interior del ala debe tener una soldadura de filete de c in. (8 mm). Estas soldaduras deben ser de demanda crítica.

step_1_notes.description: Secuencia de soldadura para conexiones end-plate rigidizadas
step_1_notes.requirement: Para conexiones end-plate rigidizadas, la soldadura entre el ala de la viga y la placa de extremo debe ejecutarse antes de instalar el rigidizador.

step_1_notes.description: Excepcion de respaldo en la raiz cerca del alma de la viga
step_1_notes.requirement: No se requiere respaldo en la raiz del ala, directamente por encima y por debajo del alma de la viga, en una longitud igual a 1.5k1. En esa ubicacion se permite una soldadura de ranura PJP de profundidad completa.
Installation requirements shall be in accordance with the AISC Seismic Provisions and the RCSC Specification, except as otherwise specifically indicated in this standard.

step_1_notes.description: Quality control and quality assurance for bolted assemblies
step_1_notes.requirement: Quality control and quality assurance shall be in accordance with the AISC Seismic Provisions.

step_1_limits.description: Beam profile family allowed for prequalification
End-plate width vs beam flange width
Length without shear connectors from column face
Beam clearance criterion using Sc and S threshold
step_1_limits.verification_text: Sc = Stc - pfo; S = 0.5*sqrt(bcf*g); Sc > S => 712.000 mm > 105.114 mm

step_1_limits.description: Clear span-to-depth ratio by frame system
Column profile family allowed for prequalification
End-plate fit within column flange width
End-plate stiffener height derived from end-plate geometry
End-plate to beam-web weld type shall be an allowed category
Bolt tightening type must be one recognized category
Bolts shall be pretensioned unless a specific connection permits otherwise
Bolt fabrication standard must be an allowed high-strength ASTM designation
step_1_limits.limit_symbol: {ASTM F3125/F3125M, ASTM A325, ASTM A325M, ASTM A490, ASTM A490M, ASTM F1852, ASTM F2280}

step_1_limits.verification_text: pso (=pfo) >= emin; pfo <= 114 mm; pfo >= 38 mm
pfi >= emin; pfi <= 114 mm; pfi >= 38 mm; psi = pfi + tfb - tcp; psi > 0

prequalification_limits.description: Beam profile family allowed for prequalification
End-plate width vs beam flange width
Length without shear connectors from column face
Beam clearance criterion using Sc and S threshold
prequalification_limits.verification_text: Sc = Stc - pfo; S = 0.5*sqrt(bcf*g); Sc > S => 712.000 mm > 105.114 mm

prequalification_limits.description: Clear span-to-depth ratio by frame system
Column profile family allowed for prequalification
End-plate fit within column flange width
End-plate stiffener height derived from end-plate geometry
End-plate to beam-web weld type shall be an allowed category
Bolt tightening type must be one recognized category
Bolts shall be pretensioned unless a specific connection permits otherwise
Bolt fabrication standard must be an allowed high-strength ASTM designation
prequalification_limits.limit_symbol: {ASTM F3125/F3125M, ASTM A325, ASTM A325M, ASTM A490, ASTM A490M, ASTM F1852, ASTM F2280}

prequalification_limits.verification_text: pso (=pfo) >= emin; pfo <= 114 mm; pfo >= 38 mm
pfi >= emin; pfi <= 114 mm; pfi >= 38 mm; psi = pfi + tfb - tcp; psi > 0

calculation_memory.equation: Step 1 PREQUALIFICATION LIMITS: compute each geometric value and compare directly against Table 6.1 limits using calculated vs limit checks (>= or <=, no DCR format).

checks.name: bueep_4e Step 2 probable maximum moment at plastic hinge
checks.clause: Chapter 6 / Section 6.7.1 Step 2 + Eq. (2.4-1) and Eq. (2.4-2)

calculation_memory.equation: Mpr = Cpr * Ry * Fy * Ze (Eq. 2.4-1 and Eq. 2.4-2)

checks.name: bueep_4e Step 3 plastic hinge distance from column face
checks.clause: Chapter 6 / Section 6.7.1 Step 3 + Eq. (6.7-1) and Eq. (6.7-2)

calculation_memory.equation: Sh from connection-specific rules (Eq. 6.7-1 or Eq. 6.7-2)

checks.name: bueep_4e Step 4 shear force at plastic hinge

calculation_memory.equation: Vhmax = 2*Mpr/Lh + Vgravity; Vhmin = 2*Mpr/Lh - Vgravity (Eq. 2.4-3, side-specific der/izq)

checks.name: bueep_4e Step 5 probable maximum moment at face of column

calculation_memory.equation: Mfmax = Mpr + Vhmax*Sh; Mfmin = Mpr + Vhmin*Sh (Eq. 2.4-4, side-specific der/izq)

checks.name: bueep_4e Step 6.1 bolt tension rupture capacity

calculation_memory.equation: Pub = Mf / (2*(h1 + h2)); phiPnb = phi * Ab * Fnt, Ab = pi*db^2/4, phi = 0.9 (AISC 360-22 J3.7)

checks.name: bueep_4e Step 6.2 bolt shear rupture capacity

calculation_memory.equation: Vub = Vhmax/nb, phiVnb = phi * Ab * Fnv, Ab = pi*db^2/4, nb = 4 (4E/4ES) or 8 (8ES), phi = 0.9 (AISC 360-22 J3.7)
Mup = Mf; phiMnb = phi * tp^2 * Fyp * Yp (AISC 358-22 Eq. 6.7-8)
Vup = Mf / (2*(d - tbf)); phiVnb = phi * 0.6 * Fyp * bp * tp (AISC 358-22 Eq. 6.7-10)
Vup = Mf / (2*(d - tbf)); phiVnb = phi * 0.6 * Fup * tp * (bp - 2*dh) (AISC 358-22 Eq. 6.7-12)
Vu2p = Vhmax/nb; phiVn2p = phi * 1.2 * lc * tp * Fup (AISC 360-22 J3.11a)
Vu2p = Vhmax/nb; phiVn2p = phi * 2.4 * (db + 1.6 mm) * tp * Fup (AISC 360-22 J3.11a)
